prompt: Create a realistic full-body vertical fashion portrait of a young Japanese woman standing on a sunny rooftop terrace in a modern city. She has a soft, friendly expression, shoulder-length wavy warm brown hair with airy bangs, fair skin, subtle natural makeup, pink lipstick, and translucent pink eyeglasses. She faces the camera directly with a relaxed, slightly shy pose, hands gently clasped in front of her waist, legs close together, wearing an elegant cream monochrome outfit: a short-sleeve semi-sheer floral lace button-up blouse over a camisole, a high-waisted fitted cream mini skirt, and pointed cream high heels. Use a flattering but natural body shape, realistic proportions, and a calm approachable mood. The setting is an outdoor rooftop with a concrete floor, low gray parapet wall, black metal safety railing, and a dense skyline of glass office towers and mid-rise buildings behind her. The sky is bright blue with soft white clouds. Shoot at eye level with a 35mm smartphone-photo feel, crisp natural daylight, soft shadows, realistic skin texture, shallow but not extreme background depth, vertical 9:16 composition, subject centered from head to shoes, no text, no watermark, no extra people.
